heading: Contingent fund
label: 288m Contingent fund
text: The expenses of the Office shall be paid from the contingent fund of the Senate in accordance with , and upon vouchers approved by the Counsel.section 6503 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 3, 1979section 717 of Pub. L. 95–521section 288 of this title
